title: Classic Italian Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Italian-inspired beef stew made with tender beef and a rich, flavorful sauce. Perfect for a cozy evening with family or friends.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, carrots, and potatoes to the pot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the browned beef back to the pot, along with the salt, and enough beef broth to cover the ingredients.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
